label: section3_q1_vague_description

messages_in.content: What was the rating factor on the Millbrook County bridge project?

args.question: What was the rating factor on the Millbrook County bridge project?

chunks.text:
PROJECT SUMMARY REPORT
Project: Millbrook County DOT Bridge Load Rating Assessment
Project Number: REP-2023-047
Client: Millbrook County Department of Transportation
Project Manager: Dr. Sarah Hendricks, PE, PhD
Date Completed: August 2024
Budget: $285,000 | Actual: $271,400

SCOPE
Ridgeline was engaged by the Millbrook County DOT to perform a comprehensive load rating assessment of the Cedar Creek Bridge (Bridge No. MC-4412), a three-span continuous steel plate girder bridge constructed in 1987
chunks.title: Project Summary вЂ” Millbrook County Bridge Assessment

chunks.text:
k Bridge (Bridge No. MC-4412), a three-span continuous steel plate girder bridge constructed in 1987. The bridge carries State Route 26 over Cedar Creek and has an average daily traffic count of 8,400 vehicles.

METHODOLOGY
The assessment was conducted in accordance with AASHTO LRFD 9th edition bridge design specifications and the AASHTO Manual for Bridge Evaluation (3rd edition). Field inspection included detailed measurement of all structural members, documentation of section loss due to corro
chunks.title: Project Summary вЂ” Millbrook County Bridge Assessment

chunks.text:
s the controlling members. The load rating analysis produced a rating factor of 0.73 for the interior girders under HL-93 loading, which is below the acceptable threshold of 1.0. This deficiency is primarily attributable to 15-18% section loss in the bottom flange at the pier locations due to pack rust between the girder flanges and the bearing stiffeners. Exterior girders rated satisfactorily at 1.12.

RECOMMENDATIONS
Immediate posting of the bridge for a 15-ton weight restriction is recommende
chunks.title: Project Summary вЂ” Millbrook County Bridge Assessment

result.summary: 3 chunks retrieved. Top match: DOC-006 вЂ” Project Summary вЂ” Millbrook County Bridge Assessment (score 0.5982).

final_message: The rating factor for the Millbrook County bridge project (specifically for the interior girders under HL-93 loading) was 0.73. This is below the acceptable threshold of 1.0, which led to a recommendation for immediate posting of a 15-ton weight restriction. The deficiency was primarily due to 15-18% section loss in the bottom flange at the pier locations. Exterior girders rated satisfactorily at 1.12.

The rating factor for the Millbrook County bridge project (specifically for the interior girders under HL-93 loading) was 0.73. This is below the acceptable threshold of 1.0, which led to a recommendation for immediate posting of a 15-ton weight restriction. The deficiency was primarily due to 15-18% section loss in the bottom flange at the pier locations. Exterior girders rated satisfactorily at 1.12.
